# matrix_whoami (Data Source)

Returns identity of the access token used by the provider.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "matrix_whoami" "me" {}

output "my_user_id" {
  value = data.matrix_whoami.me.user_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `device_id` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
